core_principles: Control Room aesthetics: Density, Data Correlation, and Scanability
Strict grid hierarchy with generous negative space around dense tables
Color is function only: 95% monochrome, colors strictly for status (active/blocked) and primary actions
Technical, flat surfaces with sharp or subtle rounded corners (max 4px radius)
High contrast typography for absolute legibility of numbers (ICCID, CPF, Status)

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 for containers. Generous gap-6 between dashboard widgets.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 fixed left navigation, rich dark background (bg-zinc-950) with 1px right border (border-zinc-800)

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
surfaces_and_micro_themes.login_card: bg-zinc-900/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl rounded-md

components.tables: Dense, left-aligned, use JetBrains Mono for ICCID, CPF, and Phone numbers.
components.forms: Inputs use bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500
components.icons: lucide-react, 18px size for standard buttons, 24px for dashboard metrics

backgrounds.description: Abstract streaks of light at night

accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must change background and text color explicitly on hover.
accessibility_and_interactions.data_testid: MANDATORY: All buttons, links, form inputs, and menu items MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_interactions.contrast: Ensure text-zinc-400 meets 4.5:1 ratio against bg-zinc-900. Use text-zinc-300 if necessary for better legibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the Dark theme as configured. Do not implement a light theme.
Use Shadcn UI components extensively for Tables, Dialogs, Dropdowns, and Forms.
Do NOT use HTML native inputs (<select>, <input type='date'>); rely on Shadcn equivalents.
For the Sidebar navigation, use a rigid, uncollapsed state on desktop (w-64) for maximum efficiency.
In the SIM cards (Chips) and Lines management modules, visually distinguish active vs blocked statuses using the predefined Badge styles.
For the login page, use a split layout: left side with the provided technology abstract background image, right side with the login form.
Apply `data-testid` to all forms (e.g., 'client-form-submit'), table actions, and navigation links.
Use CSS variables in index.css to map the defined colors to Tailwind's HSL system for Shadcn compatibility (e.g., --background: 240 10% 3.9%;).
